title: orthanthella lutea
intro: Orthanthella lutea is a flowering plant species, also known as the yellow orthanthella, which is native to Australia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are believed to help soothe and protect the skin. The health benefits of Orthanthella lutea include its potential to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Orthanthella lutea can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically to benefit from its medicinal properties.
